summary: Iteration 37 - Daily Verse Feature Testing Complete. All backend APIs (IT, ES, EN) working correctly. Frontend displays daily verse 'Giovanni 6:35' correctly on home page. Offline mode section visible in settings with 'Scarica per offline' button.
critical_code_review_comments: Daily verse implementation is solid - uses day_of_year to select verse from DAILY_VERSES_365 array
All 3 languages (IT, ES, EN) return the same reference but translated text
Verse changes automatically based on day of year (today is day 89 = Giovanni 6:35)
Offline mode UI is well-designed with clear status indicators and download button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily verse feature fully implemented: 1) API /api/bible/daily-verse?lang=it|es|en returns verse with reference, text, language, day_of_year, 2) Today (day 89) shows Giovanni 6:35 in all languages, 3) Frontend displays verse in DailyVerseCard component on home page with 'Versetto del Giorno' badge, 4) Offline mode in settings shows 'Modalità Offline' section with Online status, storage info, and 'Scarica per offline' button

features_tested.api_daily_verse_italian: PASS - Returns Giovanni 6:35 with Italian text
features_tested.api_daily_verse_spanish: PASS - Returns Giovanni 6:35 with Spanish text
features_tested.api_daily_verse_english: PASS - Returns Giovanni 6:35 with English text
features_tested.api_same_reference_all_languages: PASS - All languages return same reference for same day
features_tested.api_default_language_italian: PASS - No lang param defaults to Italian
features_tested.api_unsupported_language_fallback: PASS - Unknown lang falls back gracefully
features_tested.frontend_daily_verse_display: PASS - Verse displayed on home page with reference and text
features_tested.frontend_offline_mode_section: PASS - 'Modalità Offline' section visible in settings

frontend_verification.home_page: Daily verse 'Giovanni 6:35' displayed correctly with Italian text
frontend_verification.settings_page: Offline mode section with download button visible

daily_verse_verification.italian_text: Gesù disse loro: «Io sono il pane della vita; chi viene a me non avrà fame e chi crede in me non avrà mai sete.»
daily_verse_verification.spanish_text: Jesús les dijo: Yo soy el pan de vida; el que a mí viene, nunca tendrá hambre; y el que en mí cree, no tendrá sed jamás.
daily_verse_verification.english_text: Jesus said to them, 'I am the bread of life; whoever comes to me shall not hunger, and whoever believes in me shall never thirst.'
